releaseNotes: v0.24.14 — Three fixes from Alex's testing of v0.24.13. (1) Desktop Save-to-phone bug: on Windows, the file picker showed but the file never actually wrote. Fixed — saving now works on every platform. (2) Cycle count workflow: scanning a NEW bottle (one not already in this zone) now adds it in-place and auto-tags it with the current zone, plus an inline Scan-with-Camera button at the bottom on mobile. One-pass reconcile: add new + purge gone in the same workflow. (3) Print Label screen header text is now derived from the actual default label size (was hardcoded to '2x2 inch' after v0.24.10 dropped the default to 1"×1").
